summary: Frontend-only Expo prototype 'Dan'AI League' tested end-to-end at mobile viewport (390x844) on EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. All 4 screens (Home, Learn, Quiz, Leaderboard), bottom tab navigation, and all interactive flows specified in the review request work correctly. No backend exists (mock data only). No page errors detected.

react_native_issues.issue: React Native Web deprecation warnings: 'shadow*' style props deprecated (use boxShadow), props.pointerEvents deprecated (use style.pointerEvents). Non-blocking, no functional impact, but should be addressed for forward compatibility.

action_items: (Optional, non-blocking) Migrate shadow* style props to boxShadow and move pointerEvents prop into style on Mascot/GradientCard components to silence RN-Web deprecation warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well organized: theme.ts, mockData.ts, reusable Logo/Mascot/ScreenHeader/GradientCard components. All interactive elements have testID. All text properly wrapped in <Text>. No HTML elements used. Files are within size limits.
seed_data_creation: None — pure frontend prototype with mock data only.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All testIDs from the review brief verified live. Verified flows: (1) Bottom tab navigation Home/Learn/Quiz/League. (2) Home shows logo header, 14-day streak, 'Hi, Paco!', XP 85/120, Impact 2,340 with pink/violet gradient (visually premium vs blue XP card), Continue learning card, 4 daily missions m1-m4, badge-preview, mini-leaderboard. (3) Learn: 5 microlearning cards advance via learn-next-btn; on last card it routes to /quiz; mascot-learn + MAIA TIP bubble visible. (4) Quiz: A/B/C/D answers; wrong answer (a) shows pink banner and enables powerup-retry; clicking retry resets to idle; correct answer (b) shows green banner + quiz-next-btn (See the leaderboard) which routes to /leaderboard; powerup-skip routes to /learn. (5) Leaderboard: hero with mascot trophy, all 5 tabs (Weekly/Country/Team/All-time/Personal), top-3-podium with Isabella #1 center, ranking-list with current-user-row at #7 highlighted in neon pink, badges-grid (unlocked + locked), top-reward 5,000 IP, smaller rewards rw1-rw3. (6) Mascot present on all 4 screens (mascot-home/learn/quiz/leaderboard). (7) Logo + screen-header present on all screens. No console/page errors except expected RN-Web deprecation warnings.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs found. All review_request acceptance criteria validated successfully on the live preview URL.
